name: Polymarket Data API
description: Polymarket's user-scoped analytics endpoint — distinct from gamma-api (market metadata + prices) and clob.polymarket.com (trading). Returns user positions, trades, activity, leaderboards, market holder concentration, and open interest. No authentication required — all endpoints are public reads — but most require a wallet address argument. Use to track whale wallets across markets, find big holders, surface concentration risk, and benchmark performance against the platform's top traders.

tools.name: get_positions
tools.description: Open positions held by a wallet address. Returns one entry per (market, outcome) pair the wallet currently holds, with size, average entry price, current value, realized + unrealized P&L. Use to peek into how a known whale is currently allocated.

sizeThreshold.description: Hide positions smaller than this (USDC). Defaults to 1.

redeemable.description: Only show positions in resolved markets that haven't been redeemed yet.

tools.name: get_activity
tools.description: Recent on-chain activity for a wallet — every trade, deposit, withdrawal, redemption, market resolution claim, etc. Use for full audit-trail views or to detect that a whale just made a big move.

side.description: Trade direction filter (only meaningful with type=TRADE).

tools.name: get_trades
tools.description: Recent matched trades — fill-by-fill detail. Either user-scoped (your trades) or market-scoped (the tape for one market). Useful for replay / fill-quality analysis.

filterType.description: MAKER = order rested on the book; TAKER = order crossed and ate liquidity.

filterAmount.description: Hide trades smaller than this USDC notional.

tools.name: get_user_value
tools.description: Total wallet value (positions + cash + redeemable winnings) for an address. Single-number summary for tracking PnL or sizing-up a whale.

tools.name: get_market_holders
tools.description: Top holders of YES / NO tokens in a given market — useful for spotting concentration (e.g. one wallet holds 40% of YES). Returns position size + percent of total + wallet address.

tools.name: get_leaderboard
tools.description: Most-profitable / highest-volume traders on Polymarket over an interval. Use to identify whales worth following (then feed their address into get_positions to see what they're currently into).

tools.name: get_open_interest
tools.description: Total open interest for one market — sum of all outstanding YES + NO token positions in USDC. Use to gauge market depth + how much real money is at risk on a given event.

tools.name: get_volume
tools.description: Trading volume for a market over a time window. Use to detect markets seeing unusual flow (sometimes leads price movement).
